description: This API changes both node terminal connections of an existing vsc dc converter in the working case. A new API station_vscdc_bus_term_chng has been introduced at 35.5 in which the node terminal connection at one end is changed by specifying the converter bus number and desired node connection. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.3.0. ierr = station_vscdc_conv_term_chng(name, intgar)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Quoted name of the vsc dc line for which node terminal data for one or both of its converters is to be specified. (input).

intgar.description: node number to which the first converter end is attached.
node number to which the second converter end is attached.

error_codes.description: bus associated with node is not part of a substation.
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
